summary: Implemented receipt rerun action (US-017). Created `src/ui/rerun-button.ts` with a `createRerunButton` factory that handles async callbacks with loading state, disabled state, and concurrent click prevention. Updated `src/modules/fingerprint/fingerprint-receipt.ts` to add the rerun button in a `.receipt-actions` container (outside `.receipt-rows` to avoid focus loss), with a callback that re-collects signals, reformats rows, and replaces DOM content with a 300ms minimum loading delay. Added `aria-live=\"polite\"` to the rows container for screen reader announcements. Added `.receipt-actions`, `.receipt-rerun-btn--loading`, and `prefers-reduced-motion` styles to `src/styles/receipt.css`. All 383 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
